mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_no, status, created_time, updated_time FROM sys_permission ORDER BY sort_no, id
SELECT id, parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_no, status, created_time, updated_time FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission ( id, parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_no, status, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{parentId}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionType}, #{routePath}, #{componentPath}, #{icon}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET parent_id = #{parentId}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, route_path = #{routePath}, component_path = #{componentPath}, icon = #{icon}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_permission SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_role_permission WHERE permission_id = #{id} AND role_id <> 1
SELECT DISTINCT ur.user_id FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE rp.permission_id = #{id} ORDER BY ur.user_id
